CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2005 Continued To Mar-15-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Emalie Ortega, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 3/15/2005 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: LaVon Granger. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Eben Kurtzman, Esq. for Petitioner: Erin Moody, present as Guardian at litem for: Chloe Moody, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $50,100.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,731.26
Total Expenses $8,268.74
$10,000.00 of the settlement proceeds shall be disbursed to counsel for petitioner for payment of fees and costs.
The remaining proceeds of $40,100.00 to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in the Judgment.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
